allow: Bash(py -c "from apps.estoque.views import OutrasMovimentacoesHubView, DevolucaoClienteView, SaidaEspecialView; print\('views OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fields=[f['name'] for f in data['data']['__schema']['mutationType']['fields']]; print\('\\n'.join\([f for f in fields if 'login' in f.lower\(\) or 'auth' in f.lower\(\) or 'token' in f.lower\(\)]\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{ __schema { types { name fields { name args { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } } } }\\"}" -o full_schema.json)
